name: Sumeeko Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Sumeeko Industries Co., Ltd. manufactures, repairs, and sells automotive parts, hardware parts, mechanical parts, and screws. It offers power trains, suspensions, transmissions, exhausts, chassis, and interior parts for use in automobiles; appliances; and products for use in mechanism, construction, and other applications. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
